name: ChecklistItem
description: Represents a single task in a project's payroll preparation checklist. Tasks can be predefined (standard checklist items), manually created, or auto-created by entity automations.

project_id.description: The ID of the project this checklist item belongs to.

task_type.description: Category of the checklist task (e.g., Salary Split, Annual Leave, Rejoining Date, LOP Days, Other Minutes).

status.description: Current completion status of the task.

is_predefined.description: Whether this task is one of the standard predefined checklist items.

is_auto_created.description: Whether this task was automatically created by an entity automation or backend function.

linked_annual_leave_id.description: The ID of the AnnualLeave record this task was created from.

completed_by.description: Email of the user who marked this task as completed.

completed_date.description: ISO timestamp of when the task was marked as completed.

due_date.description: Optional due date for the task.

notes.description: Additional notes or context for the task.

linked_entity_id.description: Generic ID to link this checklist item to another entity.

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier used to prevent duplicate auto-created tasks. Format: {task_type}_{project_id}_{source_id}_{value_hash}
